    // The minimal possible sum is totalSum - dp[n]

}

function solve(nums: number[], k: number): number {
    const n = nums.length;
    const dp = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);
    // dp[i] is the maximum sum that can be removed from first i elements
    // Initialize prefix_sum
    let prefixSum = 0;
    // max_val is an array of size k, storing the maximum (dp[j] - prefix_sum[j]) for remainder r
    const maxVal = new Array(k).fill(-Infinity);
    maxVal[0] = 0; // since prefixSum[0] is 0, and dp[0] is 0
    for (let i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        prefixSum += nums[i - 1];
        const r = prefixSum % k;
        // Compute current_candidate
        let currentCandidate = maxVal[r] + prefixSum;
        // dp[i] is max between dp[i-1] and currentCandidate
        dp[i] = Math.max(dp[i - 1], currentCandidate);
        // Now, compute current_val = dp[i] - prefixSum
        const currentVal = dp[i] - prefixSum;
        // Update maxVal[r] if currentVal is larger
        if (currentVal > maxVal[r]) {
            maxVal[r] = currentVal;
        }
    }
    // The total sum of the array is sum(nums)
    // The minimal possible sum is totalSum - dp[n]
    const totalSum = nums.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
    return totalSum - dp[n];
}
